hotel_name: The Woodlands® Resort, Curio Collection by Hilton

reviews.title: Had alot of problems with this hotel!!
reviews.text:
1. I check in and my room hasnt been cleaned properly. There is someone e cigratte on the chair and a childs squish toy on the floor. The bathroom sink cant drain and the pillows have stains on them.

2. Problems reported. Wasnt cleaned up for 3 days after me telling them numerous times about it

3.

reviews.title: Very underwhelmed especially for the price paid.
reviews.positives: Good location, fun water park
reviews.negatives: Dirty rooms for price, bathtub was clogged and smelly

reviews.title: Pool was amazing
reviews.text: We stayed for 1 night in July with our two kids- the pool was amazing- a lot of water features available. we had lunch and drinks at the pool- all were very good. The grounds were very pretty too.

reviews.title: I am still looking for my reimbursement for the  hot food that my family and I left in our room and returned to find it
reviews.positives:
A Disappointing Stay Despite Beautiful Grounds and Friendly Staff



While the resort property was stunning and the staff were generally friendly, my family and I encountered several significant issues during our stay that negatively impacted our experience.



When we arrived and checked into our room, we discovered it had not been cleaned properly. There was hair on the floor and in the shower, as well as drug paraphernalia left on the balcony, which had not been swept. After a long road trip, we chose not to raise these concerns initially, as we simply wanted to relax and unwind.



Additional issues arose with billing. The resort authorized an incidental fee which was expected considering most hotels so. However, they also added a resort fee of 142.40 that had already been included in my booking through a third-party site.



Another concern involved housekeeping. During our stay, we purchased food off-site and brought it back to the room. Later, after leaving briefly, we returned to find that housekeeping had entered our room without a request and discarded our food. I reported this to the on-duty manager, Emma, who apologized and provided a credit of $98.90 to compensate for the food and the initial cleanliness issues. Now imagine someone charging you a fee that was not owed and then reimbursing you from that same fee your own money. That they were not supposed to have charged in the first place. To be  clear I was never reimbursed for my food.



Unfortunately, further complications arose. I later noticed a charge of $142.40 on my card on file. When I contacted the resort on March 24,2025, I spoke with the director, Miss Izzy, who seemed unaware of the prior incidents. Despite the charge appearing on my account, she insisted that the resort had not charged the resort fee of 142.40. Even while I am looking at the charge and the employee with who I spoke prior to her stated on my recorded line, that you all charged it but caught it.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Pros: The selling point of this resort for families with little kids is the pool/lazy river!
Cons: During the winter it isn’t open!

reviews.title: Overall not a bad hotel if you don’t care about logistics and costs. I’ve been a long term Hilton member and will not ch
reviews.positives: The location for the purpose of our trip was great. We were taking our kids to a concert at the pavilion - close proximity and easy to get to and from
reviews.negatives: The signage to understand where to go for staying at the hotel, desk registration and parking outside and in the hotel could be improved. Paid for room ahead of time and provided a card for incidentals- they charged me for the room twice. They did correct it the following day when I called the front desk but takes 5-7 days for the charge to correct itself. The restaurants are ridiculously expensive and felt like going to a true water park - as you are not allowed to bring your own food and beverages for the kids to the water area. Parking was frustrating - my husband is a disabled veteran and our daughter was on crutches with a broken foot. They had no accessible parking close to the entrance - told us we could use the 15 min parking spots with our handicap card but all those were taken overnight as no one manages that people park there for long term

reviews.title: Concert Stop
reviews.text: Great place to stay for concerts at the Woodlands. Beautiful facility with shuttle service.

reviews.title: Disappointing end to our trip.
reviews.positives: We were really looking forward to the end of our trip in Texas and decided to splurge on the hotel for our last night. The hotel is in a wonderful area with lots offered and is pleasant to look at. The restaurant and coffee shop are very lovely and the staff were very helpful.
reviews.negatives:
We were really disappointed with our stay. There was dental floss in the corridor, a bright white flashing light above the bed (fire alarm) that kept me awake most of the night. When I spoke to the concierge to ask if they had eye masks, they couldn't help - so I slept with a facecloth over my face. 
We asked the hotel if we could keep our bags at the hotel after checkout and use the facilities and we were told we'd have to buy a $90 resort pass each. The resort park was pleasant but not worth $90 they wanted and the pools could do with some attention (leaves and debris in the bottom). And then I suppose for the cost of a night's stay I would have expected milk in the rooms for coffee instead of powdered creamer and robes as standard. I wouldn't come back to this hotel, there are better options in the area.

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: Great short weekend trip with my sis!
reviews.room_type: 2 QUEEN MOBILITY ACCESSIBLE W/ ROLL IN SHOWER

reviews.title: Not again.
reviews.positives: Not a lot. Upon arrival my granddaughter was denied the backpack I had promised her. I had called the hotel in advance said it would be a $50. Charge I agreed. Was told since I booked thru a third party this was not happening. Slide and pool started out nice, turned in to a mess, literally. We were told clear pool and slide area due to “Code Brown”. Because we had booked through Booking .com they wanted to refuse free breakfast. Thankfully I had that in writing with my booking details. I took pictures of our view. When I called about backpack I also requested a grown floor room to the pool, my husband is a heart patient. If he needed to return to room I didn’t want it to be an ordeal. We were in 2nd floor facing tool shed and woods. We did get to see the grounds people trap a raccoon. My granddaughter was upset she said it was dead as they drove past our window. No there is a really nice resort just a few miles away…Margaritaville. A much better facility.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Great stay for short solo trip!
reviews.room_type: 2 QUEEN MOBILITY ACCESSIBLE W/ ROLL IN SHOWER

reviews.title: Should come with a warning level of unexpected fees!!!
reviews.positives: Beautiful property

reviews.title: Disappointment
reviews.positives: Wait staff was friendly, but couldn't offer a more reasonable breakfast option.
reviews.negatives: Forced to pay 80.00 for a breakfast buffet and only wanted a normal small breakfast.

reviews.title: Over priced , not relaxing
reviews.negatives: No sun beds available , double charged us for breakfast even though included in room rate

reviews.title: Big expectations, mediocre experience
reviews.positives: Nice facility
reviews.negatives: Iron in my room was broke, I had to ask for bath wash to be refilled, the elevator wouldn't work one day so I had to take the stairs to the 4th floor, breakfast was blocked off entirely for the HP conference and all there was for the guests were pastries, coffee, etc. on the second day of my stay, and finally I was told they couldn't give me an invoice when I checked out and that I had to get it from Booking.com.  Booking.com redirected me back to the resort--I'm still waiting. Also, I asked about print services on 10/30 and got an answer on 11/4--two days after I checked out.

reviews.title: It was ok but felt the price of the room was overpriced.
reviews.positives: Cleanliness
reviews.negatives: The tv in the room didn’t work.  Lack of plugs in room to charge devices.

reviews.title: Nice property just needs to be updated and better job cleaning rooms and grounds.
reviews.positives: The location was nice. Pool waiter Josh was wonderful!
reviews.negatives: For the money spent to stay there it should have been cleaner and updated. Rooms with old and dirty chair. Carpet ripped. Stain on duvet cover.

reviews.title: Not worth $300 a night.
reviews.positives: Great pools.
reviews.negatives: Moldy bathrooms, broken patio doors. Changed rooms. Still moldy and humid. Nail clippings on the countertop. Baseboards had an inch of dirt. Toothpaste on the door. Just awful. Rude staff at one of the restaurants.

reviews.title: Loved the pool, lazy river-needs more act for the kids. NO Trash laying around would help!
reviews.positives: Pool was great especially the lazy river. The game room was broken most of the time. The hotel needs an update as you can see the wear starting. Someone was smoking downstairs, and the weed smell you could smell out the bottom floor doors, but nothing done. Found trash scattered throughout on the side of the pool, and lazy river which for the price we pay having people be able to come in for day passes kind of defeats the novelty of it all. We pay a lot to be surrounded by trash so to speak.  Tried to ask front desk but didn't get a lot of information. Was charged twice on my hold for amenities, was told by front desk, oh lol, night shift does that a lot.. that's unacceptable. If I pay, I expect a certain kind of service.  Also had to argue so I would get charged resort fees a second time. I had already paid everything up front.
reviews.negatives: Front desk, Hardley any information provided, they looked bored and not the friendliest. The trash was everywhere on the walls of the lazy river, empty cups. No monitoring of the bands or entry at all. For the price that is paid, better service was expected.

reviews.title: Beautiful property but not worth the price if you are wanting to actually sleep.
reviews.positives: Beautiful grounds, great drinks
reviews.negatives: The walls were so thin and there was a very loud group in the room next to us. I used AirPods to attempt to drown out the noise but that didn’t work. At 1:30am we reached out to the front desk for help. For the rate the hotel charges, I expected better insulation or soundproofing between rooms. We barely slept.

reviews.title: Overall was a pleasant and relaxing experience. Sad to have paid the money and not use the facilities.
reviews.positives: Amenities were nice. Weather prevented us from exploring them or using them during our stay.
reviews.negatives: I didn’t like there was no complimentary breakfast and no covered pathways all the way around to get to restaurants etc when weather was bad.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Room was clean and comfortable.
reviews.negatives: There is no place to buy water or snack at the evening. Store with grab and go stuff was open only from 7 am to 3 pm. You need to go outside the resort to grab something to eat. Venting machines were almost empty.

reviews.title: I liked the swimming area but the service was not that good
reviews.positives: Swimming area
reviews.negatives: I had a charge I don’t know about it / I asked for my reciept 2 times and still didn’t get it // in 2 days I stayed no room service // wen I booked my dates it said breakfast included but wen I got there they said it wasn’t included 😕

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I liked te views, the comfy bed, and all the services that they offered.
reviews.negatives: Food came cold to my room. The room smelled very humid.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Clean and quiet

reviews.title: We enjoyed our time together!
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives: The poorly lit hotel room and the toilet paper on the rooms bathroom. For the nightly rate they should has upgraded paper products.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The breakfast buffet was wonderful. Lots of options.
reviews.negatives: The check in desk location was very crowded and noisy.

reviews.title: Should have been more special.
reviews.negatives: First room given had a very musky smell. Second room was OK, nothing special. The view from our room was poor, we purchased a patio but didn’t use it because it was wasn’t nice view.

reviews.title: Very nice and spacious hotel
reviews.positives: The property was very nice and clean. The staff was very helpful
reviews.negatives: The fact that a Hurricane ruined my trip and the hotel lost power.

reviews.title: I had a fantastic stay at the hotel, with exceptional amenities and service, despite a disappointing room service experi
reviews.positives: The pool area was stunning, the service was impeccable, and the Back Table restaurant was incredible - all in all, an amazing experience!
reviews.negatives: I've thoroughly enjoyed the resort's amenities, but unfortunately, the room service food fell short of expectations. Despite requesting an item be removed from our order, it was still delivered and charged. The food quality was disappointing - overcooked and burnt bread, greasy meat, and a cold, nearly inedible pizza. My suggestion would be to explore other dining options within the resort, as the room service experience was a letdown. With this exception, the resort was wonderful.

reviews.title: It was nice for a night.
reviews.positives: It was close to a lot of things
reviews.negatives: The guest parking was a long walk from the guest rooms, there were signs for a shuttle to drive from the parking area to the rooms but we never saw the actual shuttle. Also, there was a strong smell of marijuana near the pool area and in parts of the hallway where our room was.

reviews.title: Great stay, kids loved it. Will definitely be back.
reviews.positives: The pools, amenities, cleanliness, staff.
reviews.negatives: The room patios need maintenance.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Excellent
reviews.negatives: Breakfast

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Everything was great ..The staff was Amazing.  THE FOOD WAS DELICIOUS!!!
reviews.negatives: The beds were uncomfortable... the pillows too hard ...

reviews.title: The pools, lazy river, and daily kid activities were amazing!!!  Unfortunately the lack of housekeeping might be enough
reviews.positives: The pools and lazy river was the highlight of our trip!!
reviews.negatives: Housekeeping was not ideal. I had to call twice to ask for new sheets on our beds and finally when asked a third time, sheets were delivered to our door for us to change ourselves. I also noticed our bathroom was not cleaned on a daily basis. We have kids, we notice when things aren’t clean. I was unhappy with the level of housekeeping in general.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Pool area
reviews.negatives: The rooms seamed a little outdated, when I called in the morning to ask for a late check out the operator wouldn’t let me finish my question, very rude and immediately said no.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Everything!! The property offered all things advertised and more. The amenities were great, the children’s activities were really good and well planned as far as the times. Food options were good and you’re so close to town that offers even more options and SHOPPING!! Pools were spacious, plenty of seating and cabanas, game room for kiddos was cute and even had guitar hero which was great throwback action for us. We went for my birthday for a quick staycation getaway and play the golf course which was also great but will definitely take my grands back for a weekend stay.
reviews.negatives:
I really wouldn’t say didn’t like but I feel this is the category to share this part of the trip. We booked our stay through Booking.com and this included free breakfast and the golf play. When we checked in we weren’t given the vouchers for the free breakfast  so we we’re still charged for that there was nothing they could do after the fact and when trying to schedule a tee time for golf, we were given incorrect instructions three times which led to a later tee time than requested meaning we had to rearrange our plans during our stay, which was very inconvenient. So I would
Just say staff could be more informative at check in and have clear instructions on how guests need to set up golf play. We did check in with plenty of time for this to be taken care of even if it meant contacting the clubhouse to get scheduled at the time  we requested. There is no option to book for golf when you reserve your stay. You have to wait until you get to the property.

reviews.title: Perfect hotel for your wedding night.
reviews.positives: The staff was amazing! We were there for our wedding night and the day after and the staff sent us champagne and strawberries on the first day and wine and strawberries on the second night. It was so sweet. The buffet brunch was absolutely amazing. The omelette chef was the best!!
reviews.negatives: Our room was supposed to have a tub and shower but we did not. The shower head was not very good. The beds were ok.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Views of the golf course and many trails for walking and exercising
reviews.negatives: The kitchenete was awful. Tinybwine cooker instead of a refrigerator. The. Icrowave was tiny and very old. No silverware, no dishware. You can not say that the suite comes with a kitchenete. Very poor

Was told pool and slides would be open when I made my reservation.  They finally opened them up the next day.  That was the main reason we booked 3 rooms at this hotel

reviews.title: Overall stay was nice. A beautiful facility. Would have liked better Game On experience.
reviews.positives: Common areas were clean and visually appealing. Rooms were clean and comfy.  Staff was nice.
reviews.negatives: Back porch light didn’t work at night (couldn’t find any light switch, but most other rooms were on at night - motion sensor light?).  Game On arcade had a broken game that still took my money. Also the Pokemon claw game did not work once the claw went down and up without closing. Need more variety of games for kids. Also list how many credits you get for the dollars that you pay.

reviews.title: Our stay at the Curio The woodland resort could not have been better because it was already the best.

reviews.negatives: There wasn’t anything we didn’t like besides the fact that the place is so big and it was a lot of walking lol but they also have gulf carts to rent. Either then that it was perfect.

reviews.title: I recommend

reviews.title: Felt like we were transported to a peaceful, relaxing resort somewhere far away but it was right in our backyard.
reviews.positives: Everyone was super friendly and very helpful. They surprised us with not one but two pieces of cake in our room for our anniversary!
reviews.negatives: Our room with a view wasn’t really a view at all more like view of tree branches. But in the grand scheme of things it was alright.

reviews.title: Excellent, we are already planning when we can return!
reviews.positives: It’s great for families! We would find a place to sit around the big pool where we could see our daughter in the kiddie pool, splash pad or big pool. It also had a slide and an area to play volleyball or basketball in the water. By sitting there we were also close to the bar/food, and where all the events for kids would take place.
reviews.negatives: They beds/pillows weren’t as comfortable as I’d like them, but they weren’t bad either. It definitely won’t keep me from going back again!

reviews.title: Everything was beautiful.
reviews.positives: The bed was insanely comfortable. Will definitely be returning. Thanks for a wonderful experience.
reviews.negatives: I really wished you guys would serve the breakfast buffet during the week also. I was looking forward to that.

reviews.title: A must GO
reviews.positives: We loved how clean everything was. We also loved the smells. We stayed in the fairway building and they always had music playing on the outside which we loved. The drinks were incredible and  the people working were fantastic.  It's a beautiful place and quiet.  We celebrated our 1st wedding anniversary and will go back.
reviews.negatives: I honestly loved it all except I wish our room got a little more cool inside and that we had drinking cups other than the paper coffee cups.

reviews.title: Friendly staff and great service
reviews.positives: Clean

reviews.title: It was nice
reviews.positives: Very nice environment. Fireplace on the lobby is great. It was difficult to find with navigation, they have to update their address on the map. Also we booked with breakfast but then they sent us to restaurant, people In restaurant said that they have to call them and confirm etc it was weird a little but then they figured it out. Gulf area and forest was also very good. I think it is great place to stay.

reviews.title: The front staff was great and we fully enjoyed our time.
reviews.positives: The room, staff, food, restaurants, and the people were great. It was also close to the local mall.
reviews.negatives: The bed could have been bigger for a king size. The $60+ breakfast was great and we pre-paid, yet we were charged by the restaurant and the hotel front staff was able to take it off. There should be another way to take care of this so guests do not have to worry about it. Thanks.

reviews.title: Our family had a wonderful time!
reviews.positives: The service and amenities were great! We thoroughly enjoyed our stay!
reviews.negatives: There were no carts available upon our arrival or departure to transfer our belongings.

reviews.title: We had a great experience at the Woodlands resort! The lazy River was definitely our favorite!
reviews.positives: The resort was beautiful and the room was very nice, comfy beds! My grand babies loved the lazy River and they enjoyed the turtle feeding! The staff was very friendly! We are already planning to go back!
reviews.negatives: Our room didn’t feel like it ever completely cooled off, wasn’t hot but it didn’t seem like the ac was working properly! I also did not like that you couldn’t bring outside drinks and snacks into the pool area, having two small children it’s definitely needed!

reviews.title: LOVE this place
reviews.positives: The pool and the staff. We will definitely be back
reviews.negatives: We loved everything about this property

reviews.title: Honteux à fuir !
reviews.positives: Rien
reviews.negatives:
Petit déjeuner compris sur Booking mais pas à l'hôtel ... Il a fallu quitter le petit déjeuner pour retourner a l'accueil demander (voir pleurer) notre ticket !!!! Honteux

Des tips refusés au restaurant le soir car médiocre mais surprise 18% au moment du départ et a l'accueil cest pas notre probleme retourner au restaurant .... Des voleurs

reviews.title: Nice spot. Stayed there again after some years
reviews.positives: Nice calm area. Situated near Mall and Freeway. Nice Golf facilities.
reviews.negatives:
The pools don’t seem to be very tidy. The rooms could be more tidy. 
We prebooked breakfast. Don’t do that. You get charged extra fees. Staff is not informed how to handle it. You get breakfast in a restaurant half a mile away from the room. Choosing from 10 a la carte dishes you have to sign a check. After we returned in the evening our room was blocked. The hotel tried to take money from my credit card but luckily were declined. They charged me also twice the resort. After some talks to the manager I received everything back. Just be careful.

reviews.title: Overall a wonderful hotel. But with this approach of the staff, customers will be dissatisfied.
reviews.positives: Excellent infrastructure and location
reviews.negatives: The staff ruined our stay. So we couldn't explain where you can have breakfast. sent to a restaurant that is closed. And we hurried to the airport in the morning. The whole stay was ruined last morning.

reviews.title: Fun and relaxing!
reviews.positives: Beautiful grounds and pool facilities.
reviews.negatives: Pet policy ie requirement to stay with pet for duration of stay. Also - front desk staff not properly trained.

reviews.negatives: 3:00 in the morning the toilet was plugged, someone brought me a plunger, I. Said I didn’t even know how to use it. I called the front desk and they sent the same person and they couldn’t fix it either. When we left the next day still not working.

reviews.title: It was a perfect place to wind down after a long trip away before flying home

reviews.title: Exceptional
